about.title: About KCE
about.headline: Discover the Colombia few travelers ever see
about.sub: KCE is a premium cultural travel agency based in Colombia. We create experiences that connect international travelers with the country's culture, gastronomy and people.
about.mission_text: Make traveling through Colombia clear, safe and deeply memorable. No unpleasant surprises, real support and guides who truly love what they do.
about.dest_text: We operate in Bogotá, Medellín, Cartagena, Santa Marta, Coffee Axis, Guatapé and the most magical corners of Colombia.
about.val1_body: Every tour goes through a strict selection process. If we wouldn't recommend it to our own family, it's not in the catalog.
about.val2_body: Professional checkout, instant confirmation and no hidden fees. You know exactly what you bought and when.
about.val3_body: Behind the technology there is always a real team available before, during and after your experience.
about.val4_body: We work directly with local guides. Every booking supports the economy of the communities you visit.

contact_page.form_sent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact_page.email_desc: Ideal for detailed inquiries, large groups or B2B agency requests.
contact_page.wa_desc: If you're already traveling or need a quick answer, this is the best channel.
contact_page.chat_desc: Our virtual concierge responds in seconds in any language.

faq_data.q: Is it safe to travel with KCE in Colombia?
faq_data.a: Yes. We design itineraries with a focus on safety and local guidance. We select reliable partners, realistic routes and appropriate schedules, and give you clear recommendations before your trip.

faq_data.q: What currency and how does payment work?
faq_data.a: Payment is processed by card through Stripe and charged in EUR. You'll see the total before paying and receive a confirmation and receipt by email when the payment is approved.

faq_data.q: Will I receive confirmation and an invoice?
faq_data.a: Yes. After payment, we send you an email with the booking confirmation and a link to download your invoice as a PDF.

faq_data.q: How do cancellations or changes work?
faq_data.a: It depends on each experience. On each tour page you'll see clear rules. If you have a special case, write to us and we'll sort it out.

faq_data.q: I'm not receiving the verification email, what should I do?
faq_data.a: First check your spam folder. Then use 'Resend verification' on the login page. If it persists, contact us.

faq_data.q: Can I request a personalized plan?
faq_data.a: Yes. Send us your city, dates, number of people and interests. We'll respond with real recommendations from the catalog.
Yes. If you're traveling or need something quickly, WhatsApp is the fastest channel.

faq_data.q: What happens if it rains or an operational condition changes?
faq_data.a: KCE will review the best alternative: schedule change, rescheduling or an equivalent option where applicable.

faq_data.q: Do you offer support in multiple languages?
faq_data.a: Yes. We provide support in Spanish, English, French and German.
